task_completion.description: Lead is created and saved with all required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a saved Lead record in ERPNext displaying First Name 'Marcus', Last Name 'Chen', Organization 'Greenfield Renewable Solutions', Email 'mchen@greenfield-renewables.example.com', Source 'Trade Show', and Territory 'United States'.

task_completion.description: Opportunity is created from the Lead and saved with correct type and items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a saved Opportunity record showing Opportunity Type 'Sales' and an item table containing 50 units of 'Wind Turbine'. It should indicate it was created from the Lead.

task_completion.description: Quotation is created from the Opportunity with correct pricing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Quotation record in ERPNext showing 50 units of Wind Turbines at a rate of $21 each.
Look for the Quotation record displaying a 'Submitted' status badge, or the presence of 'Create' / 'Cancel' buttons which replace the 'Submit' button after submission.

task_completion.description: Sales Order is created from the Quotation with the correct total.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Sales Order record linked to the customer 'Greenfield Renewable Solutions' showing a grand total of $1,050.
Look for the Sales Order record displaying a 'Submitted' status badge.

integrity.description: Agent used the ERPNext web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ERPNext GUI loaded in a web browser (http://localhost:8080), not a text editor or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows should be visible executing 'curl', python scripts, or 'bench' commands to create the CRM records programmatically.

integrity.description: Documents were created sequentially through the pipeline.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent using the 'Create' button from within existing documents (e.g., clicking 'Create -> Opportunity' on the Lead screen) rather than creating unlinked records from scratch.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Company: Greenfield Renewable Solutions. Target Contact: Marcus Chen. Target Email: mchen@greenfield-renewables.example.com. Target Item: Wind Turbine. Target Quantity: 50. Target Total: $1050.00.
